Interface TerminalProgramElement

  • All Superinterfaces:
    ModelElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, SVSubstitute
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IForUpdates, ILoopInit, IProgramVariable, Label, MethodName, ProgramConstruct, ProgramVariableName
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    Abstract, AnnotationUseSpecification, BigintLiteral, BooleanLiteral, CharLiteral, DoubleLiteral, EmptyMapLiteral, EmptySeqLiteral, EmptySetLiteral, EmptyStatement, Final, FloatLiteral, ForUpdates, FreeLiteral, Ghost, IntLiteral, Literal, LocationVariable, LongLiteral, LoopInit, Model, Modifier, Native, NoState, NullLiteral, Private, ProgramConstant, ProgramElementName, ProgramSV, ProgramVariable, Protected, Public, RealLiteral, Static, StrictFp, StringLiteral, Synchronized, Transient, TwoState, VariableNamer.IndProgramElementName, VariableNamer.PermIndProgramElementName, VariableNamer.TempIndProgramElementName, VisibilityModifier, Volatile

    public interface TerminalProgramElement
extends ProgramElement
    Terminal program element. taken from COMPOST and changed to achieve an immutable structure
